clonePrefix.description: Prefix prepended to the local clone folder name, e.g. "@ssv" or "sketch7"

shell.description: Default shell for this config. Overridden by --shell flag. Inherited by steps unless overridden per-step.

org.description: Config-level org — used as {org} fallback when project.org is not set

cloneUrlTemplate.description: Default URL template for cloning projects when project.url is not set. Supports interpolation: {org}, {projectName}, and any vars. e.g. "https://github.com/{org}/{projectName}.git"

vars.description: Generic string variables available for interpolation in URLs and commands. Also used as fallback for {org} via vars.org.

wsRoot.description: Per-config workspace root. Supports {wsRoot} token resolved from the global ws-root setting, e.g. "{wsRoot}/bssn"

concurrency.description: Number of projects to run concurrently. Overridden by CLI --concurrency flag. Default: 5

url.description: Git clone URL. Supports interpolation: {org}, {projectName}, and any vars. Overrides config-level cloneUrlTemplate.

org.description: Per-project org override — used for {org} interpolation

clonePrefix.description: Per-project clone prefix override (overrides config-level clonePrefix)

vars.description: Per-project variable overrides — merged over config-level vars for this project only

name.description: Job name to match — the override applies when this job is selected

run.description: Shell expression to execute. Supports interpolation tokens.

needs.description: Names of steps that must complete before this one runs (informational — used for validation and documentation)

parallel.description: When true, this step is grouped with adjacent parallel steps and runs concurrently with them

shell.description: Shell override for this step. When set, takes precedence over the config-level shell and --shell flag for this step only.

steps.description: Additional steps appended after the job's steps for this project

skipSteps.description: Names of job steps to skip for this project

jobs.description: Per-job overrides — each entry matches a job by name and can skip steps or append extra steps

description.description: Human-readable description of what this job does

run.description: Shell expression to execute. Supports interpolation tokens.

needs.description: Names of steps that must complete before this one runs (informational — used for validation and documentation)

parallel.description: When true, this step is grouped with adjacent parallel steps and runs concurrently with them

shell.description: Shell override for this step. When set, takes precedence over the config-level shell and --shell flag for this step only.

steps.description: Steps to run for each project in this job

jobs.description: Named jobs, each containing steps run on every project. Select with --job <name>. Falls back to first job or defaultJob when not specified.

defaultJob.description: Name of the default job to run when --job is not specified. Falls back to the first job by convention if omitted.
